label: Compiles to UPLC
description: Compiles high-level code to Untyped Plutus Core, Cardano's on-chain execution language.

label: Generates CIP-57 Blueprint
description: Produces a plutus.json blueprint file (CIP-57) that off-chain tools can consume to build transactions targeting this contract.

label: Plutus V3 Support
description: Supports the latest Plutus V3 script version with Conway-era features.

label: Native Script Support
description: Supports Cardano native scripts (multi-sig, time-lock) which don't require Plutus.

label: Built-in Testing Framework
description: Includes a built-in test runner for unit and/or property-based testing of on-chain logic.

label: Editor/LSP Support
description: Provides a Language Server Protocol implementation for IDE integration (autocomplete, type checking, go-to-definition).

label: Package Manager
description: Includes a package manager for importing and versioning on-chain library dependencies.

label: Builds Transactions
description: Constructs Cardano transactions programmatically: outputs, inputs, scripts, metadata, validity intervals.

label: Signs Transactions
description: Signs transactions using private keys, mnemonics, or hardware wallets.

label: Submits Transactions
description: Submits signed transactions to the Cardano network for inclusion in a block.

label: Queries UTxOs
description: Retrieves the current UTxO set for addresses, allowing the SDK to know what's available to spend.

label: Coin Selection
description: Automatically selects which UTxOs to use as inputs to cover transaction outputs and fees.

label: Fee Estimation
description: Calculates transaction fees based on current protocol parameters and transaction size.

label: Mints Native Tokens/NFTs
description: Provides helpers for minting native tokens and NFTs on Cardano.

label: Reads CIP-57 Blueprints
description: Can load and parse a CIP-57 plutus.json blueprint to interact with compiled smart contracts.

label: Evaluates Plutus Scripts
description: Can evaluate Plutus scripts locally to estimate execution units before submitting.

label: CIP-30 Wallet Connector
description: Connects to Cardano browser wallets (Eternl, Lace, NuFi, Yoroi, Begin) via the CIP-30 dApp connector standard.

label: CIP-95 Governance Bridge
description: Extends CIP-30 with governance features: DRep registration, delegation, voting.

label: Hardware Wallet Support
description: Supports signing with Ledger, Trezor, or other hardware wallets.

label: CBOR Serialization
description: Encodes/decodes Cardano data structures to/from CBOR binary format.

label: Ouroboros Mini-Protocols
description: Implements Cardano's Ouroboros network protocols for direct node communication.

label: Indexes Chain Data
description: Follows the Cardano chain and stores structured data in a queryable database.

label: Provides Query API
description: Exposes an API (REST, GraphQL, gRPC) for querying blockchain state.

label: Connects to Node
description: Connects directly to a Cardano node via Ouroboros protocols or local socket.

label: Local Development Network
description: Provides a local, private Cardano network for development and testing.

label: Blockfrost-Compatible API
description: Exposes API endpoints compatible with the Blockfrost API format, allowing SDK provider reuse.

label: Layer 2 Scaling
description: Processes transactions off-chain in state channels or sidechains for higher throughput.

label: Oracle / Off-Chain Data Feed
description: Provides real-world data to on-chain smart contracts.

label: Formal Verification / Optimization
description: Tools for proving smart contract correctness or optimizing UPLC bytecode.
